{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = White Razors
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[White Razors]] are sharpened snowflakes the size of wagon wheels.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
